name: Large Codebase Navigation
description: Find and report a specific function hidden in a 200-file TypeScript project
goal:
This TypeScript project has approximately 200 files. Find the function responsible for validating JWT tokens and report: (1) the exact file path relative to the project root, (2) the function name, (3) a one-sentence description of what it does. Output your answer in this exact format:

FILE: <path>
FUNCTION: <name>
DESCRIPTION: <one sentence>
